next_assembly_action: Submit a complete R7_TO_R8P_WORK_PACKAGE_DIR and rerun Agent61 work-package preflight.

assembly_steps.operator_action: Submit a complete R7_TO_R8P_WORK_PACKAGE_DIR and rerun Agent61 work-package preflight.
Convert field-origin R7 shared tables into R8p staged draft rows and preserve provenance columns.
assembly_steps.acceptance_check: R7 staged draft exists with direct/alias/metadata-copy provenance and no template markers.

assembly_steps.operator_action: Merge reviewer, calibration, pressure-source resolution, and manual hold/release context into staged rows.
assembly_steps.acceptance_check: All operator supplement fields have reviewer/calibration provenance and join to scenario batch_id.

assembly_steps.operator_action: Merge replay episode, policy/expert action, conflict counter, and clearance evidence into R8p rows.
assembly_steps.acceptance_check: Agent52 replay rows link to the same batch/scenario windows and remain replay-origin evidence.

assembly_steps.operator_action: Materialize a candidate R8p rows JSON/table directory package and point PRESSURE_RESOLUTION_REPLAY_ROWS_PATH to it.
assembly_steps.acceptance_check: Candidate package contains six required tables plus agent52_replay_table with source/origin columns intact.

assembly_steps.operator_action: Rerun Agent61 with the candidate rows package and review R8p/R8v gates before routing to field replay.
assembly_steps.acceptance_check: R8p schema/provenance/template/bundle/temporal/semantic gates and R8v routing preflight must pass.

technical_feature_mapping.technical_problem: Route-specific work packages can pass file preflight but still need a deterministic, auditable order for turning R7 field rows, operator review, and Agent52 replay export into a single R8p rows package.
technical_feature_mapping.technical_means: The assembly gate defines the ordered route-to-rows merge sequence, required input packages, output artifacts, rerun commands, and non-bypassable evidence gates before any field replay/control claim.
technical_feature_mapping.technical_effect: The system can accept low-cost delayed field submissions without manually guessing merge order, while keeping field, operator-reviewed, replay, and validation evidence boundaries explicit.
technical_feature_mapping.prior_art_distinction_candidate: Unlike a generic ETL step, this gate ties sparse-sensing field packages, delayed operator review, offline replay export, and grey-box control validation into a staged evidence assembly mechanism.

assembly_gate_boundary: This assembly gate only defines when candidate R8p rows can be materialized from submitted work packages. It does not prove field validity, does not replace R8p/R8v gates, and cannot authorize actuator or release decisions.
